prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical Instagram Story announcement in 4K — CACTUS CLOUDS is now stocking MUHA MEDS products. Direction: 'NEON DESERT RAVE' — a moonlit Joshua-tree desert at night transformed into an EDC stage. Wide cinematic depth, dreamy, surreal, festival-after-dark. Cohesive duotone palette.

=== COMPOSITION (top-to-bottom) ===

TOP (~12%): the CACTUS CLOUDS logo (FAITHFULLY from the FIRST reference image — white cursive 'Cactus clouds' wordmark with green outline + clouds + saguaro + butterfly). Centered, with a soft glowing crescent-moon halo behind it that reads simultaneously as a desert moon and a stage spotlight.

UPPER-MIDDLE (~10%): headline 'NOW AT CACTUS CLOUDS' rendered in a soft GLOWING NEON-TUBE script (like festival signage / desert motel signage) — flowing handwritten cursive in HOT PINK neon tubing with a subtle inner white core glow and a faint pink halo bleed onto the sky. Two lines, centered.

MID-DEPTH (background plane, ~25%): a wide nocturnal desert horizon — silhouetted Joshua trees and tall saguaro cacti in dark midnight-purple silhouette, scattered across a low horizon line. Behind them, a few clean DJ-stage triangular structures glow softly with hot-pink uplight (read as distant festival stages on the horizon, not specific). A handful of laser beams arc up gently into the sky from the silhouetted stages — all in a single HOT PINK hue (no rainbow). The night sky above is a rich deep INDIGO-to-BLACK gradient with a generous dusting of small white stars and one large soft full moon set off-center in the upper-right behind the headline.

CENTER (~25%): the GOLD MUHA MEDS 'MM' emblem (FAITHFULLY from the SECOND reference image) sits LARGE and centered, treated as the desert moon's centerpiece — render it as if the moon and the emblem are the same object: a luminous gold disc with the engraved MM monogram. A clean thin gold halo ring surrounds it. No daisy mandala this time. The horizon line passes just below the emblem so it reads as the rising-moon-emblem of the night.

LOWER-MIDDLE (~22%): the three MUHA MEDS product boxes arranged on the warm desert sand foreground — a slightly raked low-angle view. Arrangement: FROZEN POMEGRANATE on the LEFT (THIRD reference image), BLUE SLUSHIE CENTER and slightly forward (FOURTH reference image), GALACTIC DIESEL on the RIGHT (FIFTH reference image). Render each box FAITHFULLY from its ref. CRITICAL: ONLY THE BOXES — NO vape pens / devices / cartridges / atomizers. Each box stands upright on the sand, casting a long soft moonlight shadow behind it. A subtle gold rim-light on the box edges from the emblem-moon, and a faint hot-pink underglow on the sand around each box. Two small glowing potted desert flowers (a single pink prickly-pear bloom and a single white daisy) sit between the boxes as accents — sparse, not crowded.

FOREGROUND ACCENTS: soft drifting cloud wisps near the horizon line tying back to the Cactus Clouds brand, faint dust particles catching the moonlight, a few small white stars and one shooting-star light streak diagonal across the upper sky. NO confetti, NO kandi-bead trails, NO scattered daisies — keep it sparse and atmospheric.

LOWER-BOTTOM (~6%): a single thin hot-pink hairline, then small clean text centered: 'AVAILABLE NOW  ·  21+' in tracked white all-caps. Below that, a compact lockup: small Cactus Clouds logo on the left, a thin gold 'X' in the middle, small gold MM emblem on the right.

=== STYLE & PALETTE ===
DUOTONE-FORWARD: the WHOLE scene reads in essentially two anchor hues — RICH GOLD (dominant, the moon-emblem, the box rim-lights, the cactus-clouds logo accents) and HOT PINK NEON (the headline, the distant stage uplight, the laser arcs, the small flower bloom) — on a deep midnight INDIGO / BLACK base. ONE small touch of the Cactus Clouds GREEN ONLY in the Cactus Clouds wordmark and a soft green halo on the closest dark cactus silhouette. No cyan, no violet, no yellow, no acid green elsewhere. Pure white reserved for stars, moon edge, and type.
Background: deep indigo-to-black night-sky gradient, soft volumetric atmosphere over the desert.
Lighting: moonlit / two-tone neon — cool indigo ambient + warm gold key from the emblem-moon + a hot-pink rim glow from the distant stages.
Finish: dreamy, cinematic, surreal — half Vegas-poster, half Joshua Tree night photo. Premium poster-grade.

=== STRICT RULES ===
- ONLY THE BOXES from the three product references. NO devices anywhere.
- Preserve Cactus Clouds wordmark and Muha Meds emblem EXACTLY as in refs.
- Spelling: 'CACTUS CLOUDS', 'MUHA MEDS', 'NOW AT CACTUS CLOUDS', 'AVAILABLE NOW  ·  21+', 'BLUE SLUSHIE', 'FROZEN POMEGRANATE', 'GALACTIC DIESEL'. No 'LIMITED DROP' anywhere.
- 9:16 portrait, full-bleed, no border. Cinematic, atmospheric.
